sections.paragraph:
Original: לאה

Transliteration: lê'âh

Phonetic: lay-aw'

BDB Definition:

Leah = "weary"
  1. daughter of Laban, first wife of Jacob, and mother of Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun, and Dinah

Origin: from H3811

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
